meta.author: Anastasia (@lir_a) - TESOL certified, Cambridge CAE (C1), based in Belgrade, Serbia
meta.note: Teacher's diary/blog format - vocabulary woven into methodology posts, not a vocab-dump channel

idioms.example: Some say that Lakhta centre is an eyesore in the historical centre.
I don't see what you're driving at.
We're getting a raise this year? Color me shocked!
My mother had a cow when I said I'd made a tattoo.
He has a beef with his neighbor.
The mountains are blanketed in snow.
I drank my umpteenth cup of coffee today.

idioms.phrase: know like the back of my hand
idioms.example: I know her like the back of my hand.
Mum would have a fit if she saw me now.
You'll do the dishes? As if!
In hindsight, I've got to admit he was talented.
He won the lottery twice — how about that.
We dodged a bullet by leaving early.
I love reading chick lit on vacation.

russian_idiom_equivalents.english: to speak Greek / to speak Chinese (to each other)

grammar_rules.rule: Past Simple vs Past Perfect vs Past Continuous
grammar_rules.explanation: Simple=факт/разовое действие. Perfect=раньше другого события. Continuous=процесс/фон.
grammar_rules.example: I wrote this post. After the post had inspired me, I decided to share. The sun was shining while I was writing.

grammar_rules.explanation: Когда вопрос к подлежащему — did не нужен
В разговорной речи используют He was like / He was all / He went вместо строгого согласования времён
grammar_rules.example: He was like, 'I'm not doing that.'

grammar_rules.explanation: Простые → союзы (and/but/because) → продвинутые союзы (however/although) → relative clauses
grammar_rules.example: The colleague I told you about lives nearby.
The city used to have fewer cars. There used to be a park here.

confusable_words.words: susceptible to illness = prone to illness

pronunciation_tips.rule: Существительные: ударение на 1-й слог. Глаголы: ударение на 2-й слог.
T между гласными звучит как D
pronunciation_tips.example: water, better — Cambridge Dictionary указывает это, Oxford обычно нет

pronunciation_tips.rule: Слушать 1-минутный отрывок, копировать интонацию и темп предложение за предложением

books: A Heart for Christmas by Sophie Jomain (B1+)
Remind me again why I need a man (C1)
The Culture Map by Erin Meyer (B2+/C1)
